description: Bounded medical English cases for offline ontology mining. Clarification answers are included when they materially sharpen the intended relation shape.

cases.utterance: Mara has high blood pressure and type 2 diabetes.

cases.clarification_answer: I mean her blood pressure readings have been high, not that she has a hypertension diagnosis.

cases.utterance: Sugar was high again, but nobody knows why.
cases.clarification_answer: I mean Mara's blood glucose reading was high again.

cases.utterance: His kidneys are a little off.
cases.clarification_answer: I mean Noah, and I mean his kidney function labs were abnormal.
